nasb.text: Woe is me, because of my injury! My wound is incurable. But I said, “Truly this is a sickness, And I must bear it.”

esv.text: Woe is me because of my hurt! My wound is grievous. But I said, “Truly this is an affliction, and I must bear it.”

cnv.text: 因我的損傷，我有禍了！ 我的創傷不能醫治； 但我說：“這是我的痛苦， 我必須忍受。”

ccb.text: 我有祸了！因我的创伤难愈。 但我说：“这是疾病，我必须忍受。”
